calcite.logical:
LogicalSystemLimit(sort0=[$0], dir0=[ASC-nulls-first], fetch=[10000], type=[QUERY_SIZE_LIMIT])
  LogicalSort(sort0=[$0], dir0=[ASC-nulls-first])
    LogicalProject(avg_age=[$2], state=[$0], city=[$1])
      LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], avg_age=[AVG($2)])
        LogicalProject(state=[$7], city=[$5], age=[$8])
          CalciteLogicalIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, opensearch-sql_test_index_account]])
calcite.physical:
EnumerableLimit(fetch=[10000])
  EnumerableSort(sort0=[$0], dir0=[ASC-nulls-first])
    EnumerableCalc(expr#0..2=[{inputs}], avg_age=[$t2], state=[$t1], city=[$t0])
      EnumerableAggregate(group=[{5, 7}], avg_age=[AVG($8)])
        CalciteEnumerableIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, opensearch-sql_test_index_account]])
